title: The physics laws of life
html:
Universal laws that are applicable across many areas and fields in life.

Momentum / Law of Inertia

Also called “flywheel effect”. The friction of getting started moving, getting from 0 to 1 is much more larger than pushing a moving bus.

Gravity Law

Or Goldilocks principle, or the “challenge vs skill axes”.

Entropy / Second Law of Thermodynamics

Embrace the chaos of uncertainty.

Wave Life Theory
